# KRONATRIX

KRONATRIX is an AI recommendation marketing and AI online presence service by Cornelius Aurelius.

Primary offer:
We build your AI online presence. We rank your site on Google and help AI recognise your online presence faster than your competition.

What KRONATRIX helps with:
- New website build
- Google SEO structure
- AI recommendation visibility
- AI-ready brand clarity
- Targeted high-intent keywords
- High-volume low-competition keyword targeting where available
- Image filenames, alt text, headings, schema and sitemap optimisation
- Google Search Console indexing setup
- Free business books by Cornelius Aurelius
- Free KRONATRIX marketing GPTs

Target niches:
Small creators, new businesses, new authors, athletes, musicians, actors and entertainers.

Main CTA:
Scale With Us With AI Recommendations

Contact:
boostyouronlinepresencetoday@gmail.com

Site:
https://cornelius-aurelius.github.io/kronatrix-ai-recommendation-marketing/
